items.title: Add Chirp/NMP regression validation catalog
items.current_gate: Migration lint gates are green after fixing the PR description contract; Android Kotlin compile + unit tests is still running and Build and Test is queued.
items.why_not_merged: The branch is mergeable at the git level but cannot merge until all required GitHub checks finish green.
progress: Adds 56 Chirp/NMP regression parity scenarios and expands the generated catalog to 320 scenario pages.
Files #734 for concrete D8 Task.sleep scanner findings in haptics, press feedback, and CarPlay startup.
Publishes the corresponding gh-pages expansion at commit e9d723fb while preserving the curated issue dashboard and screenshot assets.
items.next_action: Merge #735 as soon as Android Kotlin compile + unit tests and Build and Test pass; inspect the failing log immediately if either turns red.
